### SR-IMHK-3_2_4_2-01 - Flat Rate Margin Calculation

Scenarios:
1. TC-SR-IMHK-3_2_4_2-01-positive-01 - Flat rate margin calculation with higher short market value
2. TC-SR-IMHK-3_2_4_2-01-boundary-01 - Flat rate margin with zero market value on one side
3. TC-SR-IMHK-3_2_4_2-01-data_validation-01 - Flat rate margin calculation validates required position data

### SR-IMHK-3_2_5_1-01 - Rounding on Aggregated Market-risk-component Margin

Scenarios:
1. TC-SR-IMHK-3_2_5_1-01-positive-01 - Aggregated margin rounding with standard rounding parameter
2. TC-SR-IMHK-3_2_5_1-01-boundary-01 - Aggregated margin at exact rounding threshold
3. TC-SR-IMHK-3_2_5_1-01-data_validation-01 - Aggregated margin calculation validates all required components

### SR-IMHK-3_2_5_2-01 - Favorable MTM Calculation

Scenarios:
1. TC-SR-IMHK-3_2_5_2-01-positive-01 - Calculate favorable MTM using portfolio values
2. TC-SR-IMHK-3_2_5_2-01-boundary-01 - Calculate net margin when favorable MTM is zero
3. TC-SR-IMHK-3_2_5_2-01-data_validation-01 - Validate mutual exclusivity of favorable MTM and MTM requirement
